LanguageData.Ammo_RifleMagnum_FMJ.label: magnum rifle cartridge (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_RifleMagnum_FMJ.description: High power rifle ammunition, used mainly by long range sniper rifles.

LanguageData.Ammo_RifleMagnum_AP.description: High power rifle ammunition, used mainly by long range sniper rifles.

LanguageData.Ammo_RifleMagnum_HE.label: magnum rifle cartridge (AP-HE)
LanguageData.Ammo_RifleMagnum_HE.description: High power rifle ammunition, used mainly by long range sniper rifles.

LanguageData.Ammo_RifleMagnum_Sabot.description: High power rifle ammunition, used mainly by long range sniper rifles.
